title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build a no-code calendar app using Google AI Studio and Gemini. The tutorial shows extracting travel itineraries and converting them into calendar invitations with advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This tutorial from Google Cloud Tech walks through building a no-code calendar app in Google AI Studio using Gemini. The demonstration extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations, relying on the model's reasoning capabilities. It illustrates how spatial reasoning and code generation combine to turn unstructured itinerary data into structured calendar events without manual coding.
